findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) are guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Calibrate parameters using historical assessment data to reduce SEM impact

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency is less than 15 for some competencies
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for reliable CAT differentiation

findings.issue: DIF analysis is not regularly performed to detect biased questions
findings.recommended_fix: Schedule regular DIF analysis to identify and remove biased questions against AZ/CIS test-takers

findings.issue: CAT stopping rules are not properly configured, potentially leading to inaccurate assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust CAT stopping rules to ensure appropriate SE threshold and assessment accuracy

findings.issue: Temporal decay rationale is not evidence-based, potentially affecting assessment validity
findings.recommended_fix: Update temporal decay rationale with evidence-based research to ensure assessment validity
